stemHtml:
A flight log excerpt gives the following planning data for a Commercial Air Transport Flight. What is the maximum allowed traffic load for this flight?

Maximum Take-Off Mass: 62 800 kg
Maximum Landing Mass: 54 900 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 50 300 kg
Performance-Limited Take-off Mass at Departure: 59 600 kg
Performance-Limited Landing Mass at destination: 54 500 kg
Dry Operating Mass: 34 750 kg
Block Fuel: 10 810 kg
Taxi Fuel: 150 kg
Trip Fuel: 5800 kg
Contingency Fuel: 290 kg
Alternate Fuel: 850 kg
Final Reserve Fuel: 1080 kg
